title: Sales Funnel Audit Report
subtitle: End-to-End Funnel Health Check — Automated + Manual Action Items
author: William Marceau | Marceau Solutions
content_markdown:
## Automated Checks Completed

The following checks were performed automatically across all funnel components.

---

## 1. Website Pages — All 5 Pages PASS

| Page | Webhooks | Stripe Link | Calendly | Brand Theme |
|------|----------|-------------|----------|-------------|
| quiz.html | /webhook/lead-magnet-capture | Correct | Correct | Dark + Gold |
| programs.html | /webhook/premium-waitlist | 4 links correct | Correct | Dark + Gold |
| contact.html | N/A (Calendly embed) | Correct | Embedded | Dark + Gold |
| coaching.html | N/A (direct links) | 3x correct | Embedded | Dark + Gold |
| challenge.html | /webhook/challenge-signup | Correct | N/A | Dark + Gold |

### Key Findings
- All Stripe payment links use the correct ID for $197/mo coaching
- All Calendly links point to `/free-fitness-strategy-call` (correct, not the dead `/30min` link)
- All webhooks point to `https://n8n.marceausolutions.com/webhook/...`
- Visual identity is consistent: `#C9963C` gold, `#333333` charcoal — no forbidden green anywhere
- Contact page has no form/webhook — uses Calendly embed + email + Stripe direct (intentional, prevents spam)

---

## 2. n8n Workflows — All 8 Funnel Workflows ACTIVE

| Workflow | ID | Status | Last Updated | Issues |
|----------|----|--------|-------------|--------|
| Lead-Magnet-Capture | hgInaJCLffLFBX1G | Active | Mar 6 | None |
| Nurture-Sequence-7Day | szuYee7gtQkzRn3L | Active | Mar 9 | None |
| Non-Converter-Followup | Y2jfeIlTRDlbCHeS | Active | Mar 9 | None |
| Challenge-Signup-7Day | WTZDxLDQuSkIkcqf | Active | Mar 6 | None |
| Challenge-Day7-Upsell | Xza1DB4f4PIHw2lZ | Active | Mar 9 | None |
| Premium-Waitlist-Capture | j306crRxCmWW3dMo | Active | Mar 6 | Minor: 1 connection |
| SMS-Response-Handler-v2 | G14Mb6lpeFZVYGwa | Active | Mar 6 | None |
| Coaching-Payment-Welcome | 1wS9VvXIt95BrR9V | Active | Mar 6 | None |

### Key Findings
- All workflows share the same error workflow for consistent error routing
- Nurture-Sequence-7Day has 18 nodes: 7 Wait nodes for drip timing, 4 emails, 4 SMS — well-structured
- Non-Converter-Followup covers Days 10-60 with 6 Wait nodes, balanced SMS (3) + email (3)
- Challenge-Signup-7Day is SMS-heavy (8 Twilio nodes) — appropriate for daily challenge check-ins

### Action Required: Premium-Waitlist-Capture
- Only 1 connection despite 4 nodes — some nodes may be disconnected
- **Manual check needed**: Open this workflow in n8n editor and verify all nodes are wired together

---

## 3. SMS Templates — 26 Templates, 1 Fix Applied

### TCPA Compliance Status

| Template | Sender ID | Opt-Out | Status |
|----------|-----------|---------|--------|
| outreach_day0 | Yes | Yes | Compliant |
| coaching_welcome | Yes | Yes | Compliant |
| coaching_cancel_feedback | Yes | Yes | Compliant |
| webdev_welcome | Yes | **Added** | **Fixed Today** |
| All follow-up messages | N/A | N/A | OK (first msg has opt-out) |

### Fix Applied Automatically
- **webdev_welcome**: Added "Reply STOP to opt out." — this was the only first-contact template missing opt-out language
- TCPA quiet hours (8am-9pm ET) properly enforced in code
- STOP/UNSUBSCRIBE detection working via SMS-Response-Handler-v2

---

## 4. Stripe Configuration — Properly Configured

- **$197/mo coaching subscription**: `coaching_monthly` service key, recurring billing
- **Digital products**: $37 Nutrition Blueprint, $67 Recomp Program, $97 Peptide Masterclass
- **Webhook lifecycle complete**: checkout.session.completed, invoice.paid, invoice.payment_failed, subscription.created, subscription.deleted
- **Billing portal**: Active at billing.stripe.com
- **Payment link**: Pre-built Stripe link in use (not dynamically generated) — correct approach

---

## 5. Nurture Sequence Review

### Post-Quiz 7-Day Drip
- Day 0: Welcome SMS + email with quiz results
- Day 1: "Your Plan" email
- Day 3: Training tip SMS
- Day 5: Peptide education email
- Day 7: Strategy call CTA with Calendly link
- **Status**: All 18 nodes in workflow verified active

### Non-Converter Follow-Up (Day 10-60)
- Day 10: SMS — Soft check-in + Calendly link
- Day 14: SMS — Founding member rate ($197/mo) + Stripe link
- Day 21: Email — Value tip using quiz data
- Day 30: Email — "Breakup" positioning
- Day 45: SMS — Social proof
- Day 60: Email — Re-engagement with testimonial + Stripe link
- **Status**: 15 nodes verified, includes conversion-checking Code node

---

## Manual Testing Checklist — Your Action Items

These items require human interaction and cannot be automated.

### Quick Smoke Test (5 minutes)
1. Go to marceausolutions.com/quiz.html — complete the quiz with test data
2. Check Google Sheets Leads tab for new entry within 60 seconds
3. Check your phone for the Day 0 welcome SMS
4. Go to marceausolutions.com/challenge.html — submit with test data
5. Check Sheets + SMS confirmation arrives
6. Click the $197 Stripe payment link — verify checkout page loads correctly
7. Click all 3 digital product links ($37, $67, $97) — verify each loads
8. Repeat quiz on your iPhone/Safari — confirm mobile responsiveness

### Payment Flow Test (10 minutes)
1. Use Stripe test mode with card `4242 4242 4242 4242`
2. Complete a $197/mo subscription purchase
3. Verify Coaching-Payment-Welcome fires: welcome SMS + email + Sheet update
4. Check client portal account created at fitai.marceausolutions.com/client/
5. Cancel the test subscription immediately in Stripe Dashboard
6. Verify Coaching-Cancellation-Exit fires: feedback SMS sent

### n8n Visual Check (5 minutes)
1. Open n8n.marceausolutions.com
2. Open Premium-Waitlist-Capture workflow
3. Verify all 4 nodes (Webhook, RespondToWebhook, Google Sheets, EmailSend) are connected
4. If any disconnected, wire them and save

### Mobile Testing (5 minutes)
1. Open quiz.html on iPhone Safari — complete full flow
2. Open challenge.html on iPhone — submit signup
3. Open coaching.html on iPhone — verify Calendly embed works
4. Open programs.html on iPhone — verify all payment links work

### Cold Outreach Readiness
- Outreach strategy framework is ready at workflows/cold-outreach-strategy.md
- 3 A/B test variants prepared (generic, peptide-lead, TBI story)
- **Next step**: Build prospect lists from target sources (gym conversations, Instagram DMs, Facebook groups, Nextdoor, warm network)
- Execution cadence: dry run to self → batch of 5 → batch of 10 → full campaign

---

## Summary

| Category | Status | Action Needed |
|----------|--------|---------------|
| Website Pages (5) | All PASS | None |
| n8n Workflows (8) | All Active | Check Premium-Waitlist wiring |
| SMS Templates (26) | Compliant | webdev_welcome fixed today |
| Stripe Config | Correct | None |
| Nurture Sequences | Verified | None |
| Mobile | Untested | Manual test needed |
| Payment Flow | Untested | Manual test needed |
| Cold Outreach | Framework ready | Build prospect lists |

**Bottom line**: Your funnel infrastructure is solid. All automated components are active and properly configured. The one compliance fix (webdev_welcome opt-out) has been applied. Focus your manual time on the smoke test and payment flow test to verify end-to-end delivery.
